@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent only queried the paper_docs collection and used regex to detect "empirical" and a year before  filtering, then prematurely returned "No papers..." without ever querying the Citations table or computing total citation counts, thus missing a required step in the plan.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent incorrectly implemented metadata extraction by using naive regex to flag 'empirical' if the word appears anywhere in the text and by taking the first 4-digit year found (execute_python function-call-8118617072640170263), then summed citations for only those two misidentified papers (execute_python function-call-1553386226839965109), resulting in an incomplete and incorrect answer.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step, after querying Citations and paper_docs, the agent incorrectly identified 'empirical' papers by simply checking if the word "empirical" appeared anywhere in the full text and extracted the year as the first 4-digit match, which severely under-selected relevant papers and led to only two titles being returned instead of the full set.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent extracted "empirical" contribution and publication year by naive substring and first-4-digit-year heuristics on the full text (see execute_python var_function-call-9706345335969969102), then summed citations by title, causing many qualifying papers to be missed and citation totals to be off compared to ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing execute_python step (function-call-7497874506724323776), the agent set a paper’s year to the first 4-digit number found anywhere in the full text (via re.search(r'\b(19|20)\d{2}\b', text)), which often captured a referenced year rather than the publication year, causing most qualifying empirical papers after 2016 to be filtered out and resulting in an incomplete join with citations.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
